title: TG POLYCET Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: TG POLYCET Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Telangana POLYCET Result 2026 for Diploma Admission Rank Card has been released on 23-05-2026 on the official website - polycet.sbtet.telangana.gov.in. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the TG POLYCET result

content.text: The State Board of Technical Education and Training (SBTET), Telangana has officially released the TG POLYCET Result 2026 for candidates who appeared in the Polytechnic Common Entrance Test. The results include rank cards for admission into diploma courses across engineering and non-engineering streams for the academic session 2026.

TG POLYCET Result 2026 has been announced online on the official website - https://tgpolycet.nic.in/default.aspx. Candidates who appeared for the entrance exam can now check and download their rank card using their hall ticket number through the official portal.

Students can access their results by entering their login credentials such as hall ticket number. It is advised to carefully verify all the details mentioned in the rank card and immediately contact the concerned authorities in case of any discrepancies.

TG POLYCET 2026 results have been declared online for diploma admissions across Telangana. Candidates can now check their rank card and qualifying status through the official website. The result includes marks, rank, and eligibility details required for counselling.

rows: Telangana Polytechnic Common Entrance Test (TG POLYCET)
State Board of Technical Education and Training (SBTET), Telangana

content.text: The official authority has activated the direct link to check TG POLYCET Result 2026 rank card. Candidates can easily access their results and download the rank card for counselling purposes using the link provided below.

sections.heading: Steps to Check TG POLYCET Result 2026

items: Click on the link "TG POLYCET Result 2026"
Enter your Hall Ticket Number in the login field
Your TG POLYCET Rank Card 2026 will be displayed on the screen
Download and take a printout for future reference
